title: arctium newbouldii
intro: Arctium newbouldii, also known as Newbould's burdock, is a species of thistle in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), which is native to China and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Arctium newbouldii include its ability to support digestive health, relieve joint pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. Arctium newbouldii is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
